buildCommand: cd apps/aristo && npm install && npm run build && cd ../asli && npm install && npm run build && cd ../.. && mkdir -p public_out/aristo public_out/asli && cp -r apps/aristo/dist/. public_out/aristo/ && cp -r apps/asli/dist/. public_out/asli/ && cp apps/landing/index.html public_out/index.html
